Hero.subtitle: Enterprise-grade infrastructure for next-generation banking. Secure, scalable, and built for the institutions that shape the financial world.

Footer.tagline: Enterprise-grade digital banking solutions with cutting-edge security and seamless integration.
Footer.copyright: © {year} Digital Banking Platform. All rights reserved.

Architecture.title: Scalable Architecture
Architecture.subtitle: Microservices-based, cloud-native architecture designed for high availability and performance
Architecture.cloudNativeDesc: Built for Kubernetes, auto-scaling, and multi-region deployment
Architecture.microservicesDesc: Independent, scalable services with API-first approach

PlatformHighlights.title: Built for massive scale.
PlatformHighlights.subtitle: Comprehensive architecture designed to power the future of digital banking globally.
PlatformHighlights.dashboardDesc: Comprehensive unified dashboard with real-time analytics, transaction monitoring, and customizable widgets for complete oversight.
PlatformHighlights.architectureDesc: Microservices-based scalable architecture with cloud-native design, API-first approach, and seamless third-party integrations.
PlatformHighlights.capabilitiesDesc: Multi-channel banking, instant payments, wealth management, loan origination, and AI-powered financial insights.
PlatformHighlights.devAndImplDesc: Agile development methodology, CI/CD pipelines, automated testing, and comprehensive API documentation for rapid deployment.
PlatformHighlights.operationsMaintDesc: 24/7 monitoring, automated scaling, proactive maintenance, incident management, and comprehensive logging systems.
PlatformHighlights.techStackDesc: Modern tech stack including React, Node.js, Kubernetes, PostgreSQL, Redis, Kafka, and enterprise-grade security frameworks.

SmartCards.description: Empower your customers with intelligent card programs. Issue physical, virtual, and single-use cards instantly with programmable spending limits and real-time fraud prevention built into the core.
SmartCards.virtualPhysicalDesc: Instantly issue secure virtual cards for immediate use, while physical metal cards are shipped seamlessly to your corporate clients.
SmartCards.expenseControlsDesc: Set granular spending limits, merchant category restrictions, and multi-currency budgets directly through the API.
SmartCards.appleGooglePayDesc: Native integration with digital wallets. Customers can provision their cards directly from your banking app.

videoKyc.label: Remote Verification
videoKyc.title: Video KYC & Video Banking
videoKyc.description: Advanced video-based KYC verification and remote banking services with AI-powered identity verification, live video calls with bank officials, document scanning, and secure digital onboarding for seamless customer experience.

features.1: Connect with bank officials via secure video call
features.3: Upload and verify documents in real-time

kioskBanking.label: Self-Service
kioskBanking.title: Kiosk Banking
kioskBanking.description: Interactive self-service kiosk solution for branches with touchscreen interface, card reader integration, cash acceptance, passbook printing, and assisted customer service functionality.

features.1: Accept cash deposits and card transactions
features.3: Connect with bank staff via video call

agentBanking.label: Field Services
agentBanking.title: Agent Banking
agentBanking.description: Mobile application for banking agents and field staff enabling remote account opening, cash transactions, loan collections, customer service, and business correspondent operations with offline capabilities.

features.0: Open accounts and activate services on-site
features.2: Track and collect loan EMI payments

corporateAdmin.label: Enterprise Admin
corporateAdmin.title: Corporate Banking Admin
corporateAdmin.description: Comprehensive administrative dashboard for corporate banking operations with multi-level approval hierarchies, limit management, audit trails, and treasury controls.

features.0: Manage corporate users and complex role hierarchies
features.1: Configure transaction limits and authorization rules
features.3: Detailed audit trails and compliance reporting

corporateBanking.label: Enterprise Solution
corporateBanking.title: Corporate Banking
corporateBanking.description: Enterprise-grade corporate banking platform with multi-level approval workflows, bulk payment processing, treasury management, trade finance, and comprehensive reporting for large organizations.

features.1: Process salary and vendor payments in bulk
features.2: Cash flow forecasting and liquidity management
features.3: Letter of credit and guarantee management

mobileBanking.label: iOS & Android
mobileBanking.title: Mobile Banking
mobileBanking.description: Full-featured mobile banking application with intuitive UI, biometric authentication, instant transfers, bill payments, and real-time notifications. Optimized for performance and security.

features.0: Face ID, Touch ID, and fingerprint authentication
features.1: Send money instantly with UPI, IMPS, and NEFT
features.2: Real-time alerts for all transactions and activities
features.3: Pay utilities, credit cards, and subscriptions

retailBanking.label: Web Platform
retailBanking.title: Retail Internet Banking
retailBanking.description: Modern, responsive web banking portal with customizable dashboard, multi-lingual support for 15+ languages, advanced transaction search, and comprehensive account management.

features.0: Responsive web-based banking from any device

retailAdmin.label: Admin Console
retailAdmin.title: Retail Banking Admin
retailAdmin.description: Comprehensive admin dashboard for retail banking operations with real-time KPI monitoring, user management, approval workflows, and fraud detection capabilities.

features.1: Centralized user, role, and permission management

twoFactorAuth.label: Security
twoFactorAuth.title: Two-Factor Authentication
twoFactorAuth.description: Advanced multi-factor authentication protecting against account takeovers with biometric login, liveness detection, PIN authentication, and real-time push notifications.

features.2: Approve or reject transactions via push

DemoDialog.subtitle: Fill this out and we'll get back to you within 24 hours.
